---
title: "Data Cleaning: EPD Response Times"
output: html_notebook
---

``` {r Load packages}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r Load data}
eug2015 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2015noloc.csv")
eug2016 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2016noloc.csv")
eug2017 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2017noloc.csv")
eug2018 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2018noloc.csv")
eug2019 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2019noloc.csv")
eug2020 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2020noloc.csv")
eug2021 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2021noloc.csv")
eug2022 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2022noloc.csv")
eug2023 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2023noloc.csv")
eug2024 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2024noloc.csv")
eug2025 <- read.csv("data/EugeneCAD2025noloc.csv")

spd2015 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2015")
spd2016 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2016")
spd2017 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2017")
spd2018 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2018")
spd2019 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2019")
spd2020 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2020")
spd2021 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2021")
spd2022 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2022")
spd2023 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2023")
spd2024 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2024")
spd2025 <- read_excel("data/2015-2025 SPD Calls for Service.xlsx", sheet = "2025")
```

```{r Stack data}
# Create a list of datasets from each year
eug_dfs <- list(eug2015, eug2016, eug2017, eug2018, eug2019, eug2020, eug2021, eug2022, eug2023, eug2024, eug2025)

spd_dfs <- list(spd2015, spd2016, spd2017, spd2018, spd2019, spd2020, spd2021, spd2022, spd2023, spd2024, spd2025)

# In order to combine the datasets, the priority column must be numeric values, so we convert them
spd_dfs <- lapply(spd_dfs, function(df) {
  df$Priority <- as.numeric(df$Priority)
  df
})

# Combine each yearly Eugene and Springfield dataset
eug_combined <- bind_rows(eug_dfs)
spd_combined <- bind_rows(spd_dfs)
```

```{r Data Cleaning}

spd_combined <- spd_combined %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert the times to datetimes and numbers to make them useable
    `Call Creation Time` = as.POSIXct(`Call Creation Time`), 
    `First Dispatched Time` = as.numeric(`First Dispatched Time`),
    `First Arrival Time` = as.numeric(`First Arrival Time`),
    
    # Create a 'year' column for the SPD data
    Year = year(`Call Creation Time`),
    
    # Calculate number of minutes to arrive from arrival and dispatch times 
    mins_to_arrv = (`First Arrival Time` - `First Dispatched Time`) * 24 * 60) %>%
  
  # Remove all calls self-reported by the police and any null values in variables of interest
  filter(`Call Creation Mechanism` != "SELF") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "NULL"))) %>%
  drop_na(`Responding Agency`, `First Dispatched Time`, `First Arrival Time`, Priority)

eug_combined <- eug_combined %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert times to datetimes and other variables to numbers to make them useable
    calltime = as.POSIXct(calltime, tz = "pst"),
    secs_to_arrv = as.numeric(secs_to_arrv),
    yr = as.numeric(yr),
    priority = as.numeric(priority),
    
    # Calculate number of minutes to arrive from seconds to arrive
    mins_to_arrv = secs_to_arrv / 60
    ) %>%
  
  # Remove all calls self-reported by the Eugene police, calls responded to by CAHOOTS, and any null values in variables of interest
  filter(callsource %in% c("PHONE", "E911", "W911"),
         agency != "CAHE",
         primeunit != "_CAHOT") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "NULL"))) %>%
  drop_na(yr, agency, calltime, secs_to_arrv, priority)

# Rename SPD columns to match the EPD dataset
spd_combined <- spd_combined %>%
  rename(
    yr = Year, 
    inci_id = `Incident Number`, 
    agency = `Responding Agency`, 
    calltime = `Call Creation Time`, 
    priority = Priority, 
    callsource = `Call Creation Mechanism`
    )
```

``` {r Combine datasets}
# Combine SPD and EPD datasets into one based on common variables of interest
combined <- bind_rows(
  spd_combined %>% select(yr, inci_id, agency, calltime, priority, callsource, mins_to_arrv),
  eug_combined %>% select(yr, inci_id, agency, calltime, priority, callsource, mins_to_arrv)
)
```

``` {r Clean combined dataset}
# Remove any arrival times less than 0 (impossible) or more than 120 (too long)
combined <- combined %>%
  filter(mins_to_arrv >= 0 & mins_to_arrv <= 120)
```

``` {r Save to CSV}
write.csv(combined, "epd_spd_cleaned.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
